title: ALCOHOL AND DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: CENTER FOR HUMAN DEVELOPMENT ALCOHOL AND DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services related to drug and alcohol addiction. Services include: individual, family, and group counseling, structured outpatient treatment, and DUII court mandated rehabilitation. 2301 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 962-8800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 962-8800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8-5:30pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR HUMAN DEVELOPMENT
